mapper.select: SELECT id, book_id as bookId, user_id as userId, borrow_time as borrowTime, due_time as dueTime, return_time as returnTime, status FROM borrow WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT b.id as b_id, b.book_id, b.user_id, b.borrow_time, b.due_time, b.return_time, b.status, bk.id as bk_id, bk.name as bk_name, bk.author as bk_author, bk.isbn as bk_isbn, bk.stock as bk_stock, bk.type as bk_type, bk.status as bk_status, bk.cover as bk_cover, u.id as u_id, u.username as u_username, u.name as u_name, u.phone as u_phone FROM borrow b LEFT JOIN book bk ON b.book_id = bk.id LEFT JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.id ORDER BY b.borrow_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT b.id as b_id, b.book_id, b.user_id, b.borrow_time, b.due_time, b.return_time, b.status, bk.id as bk_id, bk.name as bk_name, bk.author as bk_author, bk.isbn as bk_isbn, bk.stock as bk_stock, bk.type as bk_type, bk.status as bk_status, bk.cover as bk_cover, u.id as u_id, u.username as u_username, u.name as u_name, u.phone as u_phone FROM borrow b LEFT JOIN book bk ON b.book_id = bk.id LEFT JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE (u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR bk.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY b.borrow_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT b.id as b_id, b.book_id, b.user_id, b.borrow_time, b.due_time, b.return_time, b.status, bk.id as bk_id, bk.name as bk_name, bk.author as bk_author, bk.isbn as bk_isbn, bk.stock as bk_stock, bk.type as bk_type, bk.status as bk_status, bk.cover as bk_cover FROM borrow b LEFT JOIN book bk ON b.book_id = bk.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.borrow_time DESC

SELECT b.id as b_id, b.book_id, b.user_id, b.borrow_time, b.due_time, b.return_time, b.status, bk.id as bk_id, bk.name as bk_name, bk.author as bk_author, bk.isbn as bk_isbn, bk.stock as bk_stock, bk.type as bk_type, bk.status as bk_status, bk.cover as bk_cover FROM borrow b LEFT JOIN book bk ON b.book_id = bk.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.borrow_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT b.id as b_id, b.book_id, b.user_id, b.borrow_time, b.due_time, b.return_time, b.status, bk.id as bk_id, bk.name as bk_name, bk.author as bk_author, bk.isbn as bk_isbn, bk.stock as bk_stock, bk.type as bk_type, bk.status as bk_status, bk.cover as bk_cover FROM borrow b LEFT JOIN book bk ON b.book_id = bk.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND (bk.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR bk.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY b.borrow_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT b.id as b_id, b.book_id, b.user_id, b.borrow_time, b.due_time, b.return_time, b.status, bk.id as bk_id, bk.name as bk_name, bk.author as bk_author, bk.isbn as bk_isbn, bk.stock as bk_stock, bk.type as bk_type, bk.status as bk_status, bk.cover as bk_cover, u.id as u_id, u.username as u_username, u.name as u_name, u.phone as u_phone FROM borrow b LEFT JOIN book bk ON b.book_id = bk.id LEFT JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.status != 1 AND b.due_time < NOW() ORDER BY b.due_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow WHERE status != 1 AND due_time < NOW()

SELECT b.id as b_id, b.book_id, b.user_id, b.borrow_time, b.due_time, b.return_time, b.status, bk.id as bk_id, bk.name as bk_name, bk.author as bk_author, bk.isbn as bk_isbn, bk.stock as bk_stock, bk.type as bk_type, bk.status as bk_status, bk.cover as bk_cover FROM borrow b LEFT JOIN book bk ON b.book_id = bk.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.status != 1 AND b.due_time < NOW() ORDER BY b.due_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 1 AND due_time < NOW()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow WHERE book_id = #{bookId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN book bk ON b.book_id = bk.id WHERE (u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR bk.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow b LEFT JOIN book bk ON b.book_id = bk.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND (bk.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR bk.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow WHERE status = 0 OR status = 2

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(borrow_time, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM borrow WHERE borrow_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(borrow_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow (book_id, user_id, due_time, status) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{userId}, #{dueTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow SET return_time = #{returnTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE borrow SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
